pageHero.title: Udemy Business Courses
pageHero.subtitle: Curated courses available on Udemy Business. Start with System Design, then coding.

cards.title: Mastering the System Design Interview
cards.description: By Frank Kane (ex-Amazon). 6 mock system design interviews with real-world questions. Insider tips from someone who interviewed thousands.

cards.title: Master the Coding Interview: DS + Algorithms
cards.description: By Andrei Neagoie (ZTM). 900K+ enrolled. Graduates at Google, Tesla, Amazon, Meta. Comprehensive DS&A with interview focus.

cards.title: Software Engineer Interview Masterclass
cards.description: 5 courses in 1: coding interview, system design, behavioral, debugging, and DS&A. End-to-end preparation in a single course.

cards.title: Coding Interview Preparation - The Softer Skills
cards.description: 40-50% of candidates fail for non-technical reasons. This course covers communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills for interviews.

cards.title: The AI Engineer Course 2026
cards.description: Complete AI engineering bootcamp. Ideal for software engineers transitioning into GenAI roles. Covers the entire AI engineering stack.

cards.title: Grokking the System Design Interview
cards.description: The original FAANG prep classic. Clear, repeatable framework for breaking down system design problems. Available on Educative (also check Udemy).
